{{DEFAULTSORT:りつりようこく}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:廃止された令制国]]|version=47305096}} [[ja:Category:廃止された令制国]]

This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Mutsu_Province]].

This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Dewa_Province]].

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[1871年]]の[[廃藩置県]]までに廃止された[[令制国]]のカテゴリ。
{{citation needed|りつりようこく}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|りつりようこく}} {{translated page|ja|Category:廃止された令制国|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:廃止された令制国|version=47305096}} [[ja:Category:廃止された令制国]] [[ko:Category:폐지된 율령국]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Mutsu_Province]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Dewa_Province]] [[zh:Category:已廢除的令制國]] {{wikidata link|Q9646360}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Former provinces of Japan]] [[Category:Historic Region Names of Japan]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Abolished_provinces_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
